enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a casual vlog update from Boulder on February 21, 2016, covering his progress mapping Boulder on Google (focusing on the area around Boulder High), plans to process and upload videos and photos to Facebook, and excitement about audiobooks and a Bluetooth/SD card connectivity issue with his phone that he needs to resolve.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Everyone should have audiobooks on their phone — if you don't, you're missing out

stances.topic: working on Google Maps while hot
stances.position: Mapping while physically active helps motivation rather than hindering it
